body: Amara, following up on our conversation from last week — I wanted to share that [Benchmark](vc-firms/benchmark) has been looking more closely at the climate infrastructure space, and after reviewing a few deals in your portfolio, I think there's a real opportunity for us to co-invest on the right Series A. I know you mentioned [Halfway Capital](vc-firms/halfway-capital) tends to move fast at the seed stage, so I'm curious whether you're already seeing anything that might warrant a larger check at the next round. A few names have come across my desk recently that seem to be gaining traction in grid-edge AI, and I'd love to compare notes before things get competitive. Would you have thirty minutes this week or next for a call?
